title: SIES College Merit List 2026

detail.title: SIES College Merit List 2026
detail.short_info: SIES College Merit List 2026 (First Merit List) Out - Download PDF Here

content.text: SIES College Merit List 2026 (First Merit List) has been released on 26 May 2026 for FYBA, FYBSc, FYBCom (Inhouse & Minority) and other courses. Candidates can now download the merit lists from the official website siesascs.edu.in.

SIES College of Arts, Science and Commerce (Empowered Autonomous), Sion West, Mumbai, has started the First Year Degree admissions for the academic year 2026-27. The college is affiliated with the University of Mumbai and offers various undergraduate programs.

rows: SIES College of Arts, Science & Commerce

sections.heading: Important Dates for SIES College Merit List 2026

content.text: Here are the direct links to download the First Merit List 2026:
Place Direct Merit List Link Here for best user experience.

sections.heading: How to Check SIES College Merit List 2026

items: Click on the relevant Merit List link.
Download the PDF and search for your name using Ctrl + F.
Follow the guidelines for document verification and fee payment.
